module Integration.Http

POST :: Method
PUT :: Method

data Request command

module Integration.OpenRouter
Assistant :: Role
Choice :: Message -> FinishReason -> {-# UNPACK #-}Int -> Array ToolCall -> Choice
Config :: Maybe Float -> Maybe Int -> Maybe Float -> Maybe Float -> Maybe Float -> Maybe Text -> Maybe Text -> Int -> Config
ContentFilter :: FinishReason
ImageUrl :: Text -> ImageUrl
ImageUrlPart :: ImageUrl -> ContentPart
Length :: FinishReason
Message :: Role -> Content -> Message
MultiContent :: Array ContentPart -> Content
Request :: Array Message -> Text -> Config -> (Response -> command) -> (Text -> command) -> Request command
Response :: Text -> Text -> Array Choice -> Maybe Usage -> Response
Stop :: FinishReason
System :: Role
TextContent :: Text -> Content
TextPart :: Text -> ContentPart
Unknown :: Text -> FinishReason
Usage :: Int -> Int -> Int -> Usage
User :: Role
[choices] :: Response -> Array Choice
[completionTokens] :: Usage -> Int
[config] :: Request command -> Config
[content] :: Message -> Content
[finishReason] :: Choice -> FinishReason
[frequencyPenalty] :: Config -> Maybe Float
[id] :: Response -> Text
[index] :: Choice -> {-# UNPACK #-}Int
[maxTokens] :: Config -> Maybe Int
[message] :: Choice -> Message
[messages] :: Request command -> Array Message
[model] :: Request command -> Text
[model] :: Response -> Text
[onError] :: Request command -> Text -> command
[onSuccess] :: Request command -> Response -> command
[presencePenalty] :: Config -> Maybe Float
[promptTokens] :: Usage -> Int
[referer] :: Config -> Maybe Text
[role] :: Message -> Role
[temperature] :: Config -> Maybe Float
[timeoutSeconds] :: Config -> Int
[title] :: Config -> Maybe Text
[toolCalls] :: Choice -> Array ToolCall
[topP] :: Config -> Maybe Float
[totalTokens] :: Usage -> Int
[url] :: ImageUrl -> Text
[usage] :: Response -> Maybe Usage
assistant :: Text -> Message
chatCompletion :: Array Message -> Text -> (Response -> command) -> (Text -> command) -> Request command
data Choice
data Config
data Content
data ContentPart
data FinishReason
data ImageUrl
data Message
data Request command
data Response
data Role
data Usage
defaultConfig :: Config
system :: Text -> Message
toHttpRequest :: Request command -> Request command
user :: Text -> Message
userWithAttachment :: Text -> Text -> Text -> Message

module Integration.OpenRouter.Internal
RequestBody :: Array Message -> Text -> Bool -> Maybe Float -> Maybe Int -> Maybe Float -> Maybe Float -> Maybe Float -> Maybe (Array Value) -> Maybe Text -> RequestBody
[frequency_penalty] :: RequestBody -> Maybe Float
[max_tokens] :: RequestBody -> Maybe Int
[messages] :: RequestBody -> Array Message
[model] :: RequestBody -> Text
[presence_penalty] :: RequestBody -> Maybe Float
[stream] :: RequestBody -> Bool
[temperature] :: RequestBody -> Maybe Float
[tool_choice] :: RequestBody -> Maybe Text
[tools] :: RequestBody -> Maybe (Array Value)
[top_p] :: RequestBody -> Maybe Float
buildHeaders :: Config -> Array (Text, Text)
data RequestBody
handleError :: Request command -> Text -> command
handleSuccess :: Request command -> Response -> command
instance (Data.Aeson.Types.ToJSON.ToJSON command, GHC.TypeLits.KnownSymbol (Service.Command.Core.NameOf command)) => Integration.ToAction (Integration.OpenRouter.Request.Request command)
instance Data.Aeson.Types.ToJSON.ToJSON Integration.OpenRouter.Internal.RequestBody
instance GHC.Classes.Eq Integration.OpenRouter.Internal.RequestBody
instance GHC.Generics.Generic Integration.OpenRouter.Internal.RequestBody
instance GHC.Show.Show Integration.OpenRouter.Internal.RequestBody
toHttpRequest :: Request command -> Request command

module Integration.OpenRouter.Message
Assistant :: Role
ImageUrl :: Text -> ImageUrl
ImageUrlPart :: ImageUrl -> ContentPart
Message :: Role -> Content -> Message
MultiContent :: Array ContentPart -> Content
System :: Role
TextContent :: Text -> Content
TextPart :: Text -> ContentPart
User :: Role
[content] :: Message -> Content
[role] :: Message -> Role
[url] :: ImageUrl -> Text
assistant :: Text -> Message
data Content
data ContentPart
data ImageUrl
data Message
data Role
instance Data.Aeson.Types.FromJSON.FromJSON Integration.OpenRouter.Message.Content
instance Data.Aeson.Types.FromJSON.FromJSON Integration.OpenRouter.Message.ContentPart
instance Data.Aeson.Types.FromJSON.FromJSON Integration.OpenRouter.Message.ImageUrl
instance Data.Aeson.Types.FromJSON.FromJSON Integration.OpenRouter.Message.Message
instance Data.Aeson.Types.FromJSON.FromJSON Integration.OpenRouter.Message.Role
instance Data.Aeson.Types.ToJSON.ToJSON Integration.OpenRouter.Message.Content
instance Data.Aeson.Types.ToJSON.ToJSON Integration.OpenRouter.Message.ContentPart
instance Data.Aeson.Types.ToJSON.ToJSON Integration.OpenRouter.Message.ImageUrl
instance Data.Aeson.Types.ToJSON.ToJSON Integration.OpenRouter.Message.Message
instance Data.Aeson.Types.ToJSON.ToJSON Integration.OpenRouter.Message.Role
instance GHC.Classes.Eq Integration.OpenRouter.Message.Content
instance GHC.Classes.Eq Integration.OpenRouter.Message.ContentPart
instance GHC.Classes.Eq Integration.OpenRouter.Message.ImageUrl
instance GHC.Classes.Eq Integration.OpenRouter.Message.Message
instance GHC.Classes.Eq Integration.OpenRouter.Message.Role
instance GHC.Generics.Generic Integration.OpenRouter.Message.Content
instance GHC.Generics.Generic Integration.OpenRouter.Message.ContentPart
instance GHC.Generics.Generic Integration.OpenRouter.Message.ImageUrl
instance GHC.Generics.Generic Integration.OpenRouter.Message.Message
instance GHC.Generics.Generic Integration.OpenRouter.Message.Role
instance GHC.Show.Show Integration.OpenRouter.Message.Content
instance GHC.Show.Show Integration.OpenRouter.Message.ContentPart
instance GHC.Show.Show Integration.OpenRouter.Message.ImageUrl
instance GHC.Show.Show Integration.OpenRouter.Message.Message
instance GHC.Show.Show Integration.OpenRouter.Message.Role
system :: Text -> Message
user :: Text -> Message
userWithAttachment :: Text -> Text -> Text -> Message

module Integration.OpenRouter.Request
Config :: Maybe Float -> Maybe Int -> Maybe Float -> Maybe Float -> Maybe Float -> Maybe Text -> Maybe Text -> Int -> Config
Request :: Array Message -> Text -> Config -> (Response -> command) -> (Text -> command) -> Request command
[config] :: Request command -> Config
[frequencyPenalty] :: Config -> Maybe Float
[maxTokens] :: Config -> Maybe Int
[messages] :: Request command -> Array Message
[model] :: Request command -> Text
[onError] :: Request command -> Text -> command
[onSuccess] :: Request command -> Response -> command
[presencePenalty] :: Config -> Maybe Float
[referer] :: Config -> Maybe Text
[temperature] :: Config -> Maybe Float
[timeoutSeconds] :: Config -> Int
[title] :: Config -> Maybe Text
[topP] :: Config -> Maybe Float
chatCompletion :: Array Message -> Text -> (Response -> command) -> (Text -> command) -> Request command
data Config
data Request command
defaultConfig :: Config
instance GHC.Classes.Eq Integration.OpenRouter.Request.Config
instance GHC.Generics.Generic Integration.OpenRouter.Request.Config
instance GHC.Show.Show Integration.OpenRouter.Request.Config

module Integration.OpenRouter.Response
Choice :: Message -> FinishReason -> {-# UNPACK #-}Int -> Array ToolCall -> Choice
ContentFilter :: FinishReason
Length :: FinishReason
Response :: Text -> Text -> Array Choice -> Maybe Usage -> Response
Stop :: FinishReason
ToolCall :: Text -> ToolCallFunction -> ToolCall
ToolCallFunction :: Text -> Redacted Text -> ToolCallFunction
Unknown :: Text -> FinishReason
Usage :: Int -> Int -> Int -> Usage
[arguments] :: ToolCallFunction -> Redacted Text
[choices] :: Response -> Array Choice
[completionTokens] :: Usage -> Int
[finishReason] :: Choice -> FinishReason
[function] :: ToolCall -> ToolCallFunction
[id] :: Response -> Text
[id] :: ToolCall -> Text
[index] :: Choice -> {-# UNPACK #-}Int
[message] :: Choice -> Message
[model] :: Response -> Text
[name] :: ToolCallFunction -> Text
[promptTokens] :: Usage -> Int
[toolCalls] :: Choice -> Array ToolCall
[totalTokens] :: Usage -> Int
[usage] :: Response -> Maybe Usage
data Choice
data FinishReason
data Response
data ToolCall
data ToolCallFunction
data Usage
instance Data.Aeson.Types.FromJSON.FromJSON Integration.OpenRouter.Response.Choice
instance Data.Aeson.Types.FromJSON.FromJSON Integration.OpenRouter.Response.FinishReason
instance Data.Aeson.Types.FromJSON.FromJSON Integration.OpenRouter.Response.Response
instance Data.Aeson.Types.FromJSON.FromJSON Integration.OpenRouter.Response.ToolCall
instance Data.Aeson.Types.FromJSON.FromJSON Integration.OpenRouter.Response.ToolCallFunction
instance Data.Aeson.Types.FromJSON.FromJSON Integration.OpenRouter.Response.Usage
instance Data.Aeson.Types.ToJSON.ToJSON Integration.OpenRouter.Response.Choice
instance Data.Aeson.Types.ToJSON.ToJSON Integration.OpenRouter.Response.FinishReason
instance Data.Aeson.Types.ToJSON.ToJSON Integration.OpenRouter.Response.Response
instance Data.Aeson.Types.ToJSON.ToJSON Integration.OpenRouter.Response.ToolCall
instance Data.Aeson.Types.ToJSON.ToJSON Integration.OpenRouter.Response.ToolCallFunction
instance Data.Aeson.Types.ToJSON.ToJSON Integration.OpenRouter.Response.Usage
instance GHC.Classes.Eq Integration.OpenRouter.Response.Choice
instance GHC.Classes.Eq Integration.OpenRouter.Response.FinishReason
instance GHC.Classes.Eq Integration.OpenRouter.Response.Response
instance GHC.Classes.Eq Integration.OpenRouter.Response.ToolCall
instance GHC.Classes.Eq Integration.OpenRouter.Response.ToolCallFunction
instance GHC.Classes.Eq Integration.OpenRouter.Response.Usage
instance GHC.Generics.Generic Integration.OpenRouter.Response.Choice
instance GHC.Generics.Generic Integration.OpenRouter.Response.FinishReason
instance GHC.Generics.Generic Integration.OpenRouter.Response.Response
instance GHC.Generics.Generic Integration.OpenRouter.Response.ToolCall
instance GHC.Generics.Generic Integration.OpenRouter.Response.ToolCallFunction
instance GHC.Generics.Generic Integration.OpenRouter.Response.Usage
instance GHC.Show.Show Integration.OpenRouter.Response.FinishReason
instance GHC.Show.Show Integration.OpenRouter.Response.Usage

module Integration.Oura
ActivityContributors :: Maybe Int -> Maybe Int -> Maybe Int -> Maybe Int -> Maybe Int -> Maybe Int -> ActivityContributors
ActivityData :: Text -> Text -> Maybe Int -> Maybe Int -> Maybe Int -> Maybe Int -> Maybe Int -> Maybe Int -> Maybe Int -> Text -> Maybe Float -> Maybe Text -> Maybe ActivityContributors -> Maybe Int -> Maybe Int -> Maybe Int -> Maybe Int -> Maybe Int -> Maybe SampleModel -> Maybe Int -> Maybe Int -> Maybe Int -> Maybe Int -> Maybe Int -> Maybe Int -> Maybe Int -> ActivityData
DailyActivity :: Text -> Text -> Text -> (Array ActivityData -> command) -> Maybe (Text -> command) -> DailyActivity command
DailyCardiovascularAge :: Text -> Text -> Text -> (Array DailyCardiovascularAgeData -> command) -> Maybe (Text -> command) -> DailyCardiovascularAge command
DailyCardiovascularAgeData :: Text -> Text -> Maybe Int -> DailyCardiovascularAgeData
DailyReadiness :: Text -> Text -> Text -> (Array ReadinessData -> command) -> Maybe (Text -> command) -> DailyReadiness command
DailyResilience :: Text -> Text -> Text -> (Array DailyResilienceData -> command) -> Maybe (Text -> command) -> DailyResilience command
DailyResilienceData :: Text -> Text -> Maybe ResilienceContributors -> Maybe Text -> DailyResilienceData
DailySleep :: Text -> Text -> Text -> (Array SleepData -> command) -> Maybe (Text -> command) -> DailySleep command
DailySpO2 :: Text -> Text -> Text -> (Array DailySpO2Data -> command) -> Maybe (Text -> command) -> DailySpO2 command
DailySpO2Data :: Text -> Text -> Maybe SpO2AggregatedValues -> DailySpO2Data
DailyStress :: Text -> Text -> Text -> (Array DailyStressData -> command) -> Maybe (Text -> command) -> DailyStress command
DailyStressData :: Text -> Text -> Maybe Float -> Maybe Float -> Maybe Text -> DailyStressData
EnhancedTag :: Text -> Text -> Text -> (Array EnhancedTagData -> command) -> Maybe (Text -> command) -> EnhancedTag command
EnhancedTagData :: Text -> Text -> Maybe Text -> Maybe Text -> Maybe Text -> Maybe Text -> Maybe Text -> Maybe Text -> Maybe Text -> EnhancedTagData
HeartRate :: Text -> Text -> Text -> (Array HeartRateData -> command) -> Maybe (Text -> command) -> HeartRate command
HeartRateData :: Int -> Text -> Text -> HeartRateData
PaginatedResponse :: [value] -> Maybe Text -> PaginatedResponse value
PersonalInfo :: Text -> (PersonalInfoData -> command) -> Maybe (Text -> command) -> PersonalInfo command
PersonalInfoData :: Text -> Maybe Int -> Maybe Float -> Maybe Float -> Maybe Text -> Maybe Text -> PersonalInfoData
ReadinessContributors :: Maybe Int -> Maybe Int -> Maybe Int -> Maybe Int -> Maybe Int -> Maybe Int -> Maybe Int -> Maybe Int -> Maybe Int -> ReadinessContributors
ReadinessData :: Text -> Text -> Maybe Int -> Maybe Float -> Maybe Float -> Text -> Maybe ReadinessContributors -> ReadinessData
ResilienceContributors :: Maybe Float -> Maybe Float -> Maybe Float -> ResilienceContributors
RestModeEpisode :: Maybe [Text] -> Text -> RestModeEpisode
RestModePeriod :: Text -> Text -> Text -> (Array RestModePeriodData -> command) -> Maybe (Text -> command) -> RestModePeriod command
RestModePeriodData :: Text -> Maybe Text -> Maybe Text -> Maybe [RestModeEpisode] -> Maybe Text -> Maybe Text -> RestModePeriodData
RingConfiguration :: Text -> Text -> Text -> (Array RingConfigurationData -> command) -> Maybe (Text -> command) -> RingConfiguration command
RingConfigurationData :: Text -> Maybe Text -> Maybe Text -> Maybe Text -> Maybe Text -> Maybe Text -> Maybe Int -> RingConfigurationData
SampleModel :: Maybe Float -> Maybe [Maybe Float] -> Maybe Text -> SampleModel
Session :: Text -> Text -> Text -> (Array SessionData -> command) -> Maybe (Text -> command) -> Session command
SessionData :: Text -> Text -> Maybe Text -> Maybe SampleModel -> Maybe SampleModel -> Maybe Text -> Maybe SampleModel -> Maybe Text -> Maybe Text -> SessionData
SleepContributors :: Maybe Int -> Maybe Int -> Maybe Int -> Maybe Int -> Maybe Int -> Maybe Int -> Maybe Int -> SleepContributors
SleepData :: Text -> Text -> Maybe Int -> Text -> Maybe SleepContributors -> SleepData
SleepPeriod :: Text -> Text -> Text -> (Array SleepPeriodData -> command) -> Maybe (Text -> command) -> SleepPeriod command
SleepPeriodData :: Text -> Text -> Text -> Maybe Float -> Maybe Float -> Maybe Float -> Maybe Int -> Maybe Text -> Maybe Text -> Maybe Int -> Maybe Int -> Maybe SampleModel -> Maybe SampleModel -> Maybe Int -> Maybe Int -> Maybe Bool -> Maybe Int -> Maybe Text -> Maybe Int -> Maybe SleepPeriodReadiness -> Maybe Float -> Maybe Int -> Maybe Int -> Maybe Text -> Maybe Text -> Maybe Float -> Maybe Int -> Maybe Int -> Maybe Text -> SleepPeriodData
SleepPeriodReadiness :: Maybe ReadinessContributors -> Maybe Int -> Maybe Float -> Maybe Float -> SleepPeriodReadiness
SleepTime :: Text -> Text -> Text -> (Array SleepTimeData -> command) -> Maybe (Text -> command) -> SleepTime command
SleepTimeData :: Text -> Text -> Maybe Text -> Maybe Text -> Maybe Text -> Maybe Text -> Maybe Text -> SleepTimeData
SpO2AggregatedValues :: Float -> SpO2AggregatedValues
SyncAll :: Text -> Text -> Text -> (SyncResult -> command) -> Maybe (Text -> command) -> SyncAll command
SyncResult :: Array SleepData -> Array ActivityData -> Array ReadinessData -> Array HeartRateData -> Array WorkoutData -> Array SessionData -> PersonalInfoData -> Array DailyStressData -> Array DailySpO2Data -> Array DailyResilienceData -> Array DailyCardiovascularAgeData -> Array VO2MaxData -> Array EnhancedTagData -> Array SleepTimeData -> Array RestModePeriodData -> Array RingConfigurationData -> Array SleepPeriodData -> SyncResult
VO2Max :: Text -> Text -> Text -> (Array VO2MaxData -> command) -> Maybe (Text -> command) -> VO2Max command
VO2MaxData :: Text -> Text -> Maybe Float -> Maybe Text -> VO2MaxData
Workout :: Text -> Text -> Text -> (Array WorkoutData -> command) -> Maybe (Text -> command) -> Workout command
WorkoutData :: Text -> Text -> Maybe Text -> Maybe Float -> Maybe Float -> Maybe Text -> Maybe Text -> Maybe Text -> Maybe Text -> Maybe Text -> WorkoutData
[activeCalories] :: ActivityData -> Maybe Int
[activityBalance] :: ReadinessContributors -> Maybe Int

[activity] :: WorkoutData -> Maybe Text

data RestModePeriod command

data RingConfiguration command
data RingConfigurationData
data SampleModel
data Session command
data SessionData
data SleepContributors
data SleepData
data SleepPeriod command
data SleepPeriodData
data SleepPeriodReadiness
data SleepTime command
data SleepTimeData
data SpO2AggregatedValues
data SyncAll command
data SyncResult
data VO2Max command
data VO2MaxData
data Workout command
data WorkoutData
makeOuraConfig :: ClientId -> ClientSecret -> RedirectUri -> (Text -> TokenKey -> Text) -> (Text -> OAuth2Error -> Text) -> (Text -> Text) -> Text -> Text -> OAuth2ProviderConfig
ouraProvider :: Provider

module Integration.Oura.Activity
DailyActivity :: Text -> Text -> Text -> (Array ActivityData -> command) -> Maybe (Text -> command) -> DailyActivity command
[endDate] :: DailyActivity command -> Text
[onError] :: DailyActivity command -> Maybe (Text -> command)
[onSuccess] :: DailyActivity command -> Array ActivityData -> command
[startDate] :: DailyActivity command -> Text
[userId] :: DailyActivity command -> Text
data DailyActivity command

module Integration.Oura.DailyCardiovascularAge
DailyCardiovascularAge :: Text -> Text -> Text -> (Array DailyCardiovascularAgeData -> command) -> Maybe (Text -> command) -> DailyCardiovascularAge command
[endDate] :: DailyCardiovascularAge command -> Text
[onError] :: DailyCardiovascularAge command -> Maybe (Text -> command)
[onSuccess] :: DailyCardiovascularAge command -> Array DailyCardiovascularAgeData -> command
[startDate] :: DailyCardiovascularAge command -> Text
[userId] :: DailyCardiovascularAge command -> Text
data DailyCardiovascularAge command

module Integration.Oura.DailyResilience
DailyResilience :: Text -> Text -> Text -> (Array DailyResilienceData -> command) -> Maybe (Text -> command) -> DailyResilience command
[endDate] :: DailyResilience command -> Text
[onError] :: DailyResilience command -> Maybe (Text -> command)
[onSuccess] :: DailyResilience command -> Array DailyResilienceData -> command
[startDate] :: DailyResilience command -> Text
[userId] :: DailyResilience command -> Text
data DailyResilience command

module Integration.Oura.DailySpO2
DailySpO2 :: Text -> Text -> Text -> (Array DailySpO2Data -> command) -> Maybe (Text -> command) -> DailySpO2 command
[endDate] :: DailySpO2 command -> Text
[onError] :: DailySpO2 command -> Maybe (Text -> command)
[onSuccess] :: DailySpO2 command -> Array DailySpO2Data -> command
[startDate] :: DailySpO2 command -> Text
[userId] :: DailySpO2 command -> Text
data DailySpO2 command

module Integration.Oura.DailyStress
DailyStress :: Text -> Text -> Text -> (Array DailyStressData -> command) -> Maybe (Text -> command) -> DailyStress command
[endDate] :: DailyStress command -> Text
[onError] :: DailyStress command -> Maybe (Text -> command)
[onSuccess] :: DailyStress command -> Array DailyStressData -> command
[startDate] :: DailyStress command -> Text
[userId] :: DailyStress command -> Text
data DailyStress command

module Integration.Oura.EnhancedTag
EnhancedTag :: Text -> Text -> Text -> (Array EnhancedTagData -> command) -> Maybe (Text -> command) -> EnhancedTag command
[endDate] :: EnhancedTag command -> Text
[onError] :: EnhancedTag command -> Maybe (Text -> command)
[onSuccess] :: EnhancedTag command -> Array EnhancedTagData -> command
[startDate] :: EnhancedTag command -> Text
[userId] :: EnhancedTag command -> Text
data EnhancedTag command

module Integration.Oura.HeartRate
HeartRate :: Text -> Text -> Text -> (Array HeartRateData -> command) -> Maybe (Text -> command) -> HeartRate command
[endDatetime] :: HeartRate command -> Text
[onError] :: HeartRate command -> Maybe (Text -> command)
[onSuccess] :: HeartRate command -> Array HeartRateData -> command
[startDatetime] :: HeartRate command -> Text
[userId] :: HeartRate command -> Text
data HeartRate command

module Integration.Oura.Internal
OtherHttpError :: Text -> OuraHttpError
OuraRateLimited :: Int -> OuraHttpError
Unauthorized :: OuraHttpError
data OuraHttpError
executeDailyActivityInternal :: HttpFetch ActivityData -> Text -> Text -> Task OuraHttpError (Array ActivityData)
executeDailyCardiovascularAgeInternal :: HttpFetch DailyCardiovascularAgeData -> Text -> Text -> Task OuraHttpError (Array DailyCardiovascularAgeData)
executeDailyReadinessInternal :: HttpFetch ReadinessData -> Text -> Text -> Task OuraHttpError (Array ReadinessData)
executeDailyResilienceInternal :: HttpFetch DailyResilienceData -> Text -> Text -> Task OuraHttpError (Array DailyResilienceData)
executeDailySleepInternal :: HttpFetch SleepData -> Text -> Text -> Task OuraHttpError (Array SleepData)
executeDailySpO2Internal :: HttpFetch DailySpO2Data -> Text -> Text -> Task OuraHttpError (Array DailySpO2Data)
executeDailyStressInternal :: HttpFetch DailyStressData -> Text -> Text -> Task OuraHttpError (Array DailyStressData)
executeEnhancedTagInternal :: HttpFetch EnhancedTagData -> Text -> Text -> Task OuraHttpError (Array EnhancedTagData)
executeHeartRateInternal :: HttpFetch HeartRateData -> Text -> Text -> Task OuraHttpError (Array HeartRateData)
executePersonalInfoInternal :: HttpFetchSingle PersonalInfoData -> Text -> Text -> Task OuraHttpError PersonalInfoData
executeRestModePeriodInternal :: HttpFetch RestModePeriodData -> Text -> Text -> Task OuraHttpError (Array RestModePeriodData)
executeRingConfigurationInternal :: HttpFetch RingConfigurationData -> Text -> Text -> Task OuraHttpError (Array RingConfigurationData)
executeSessionInternal :: HttpFetch SessionData -> Text -> Text -> Task OuraHttpError (Array SessionData)
executeSleepPeriodInternal :: HttpFetch SleepPeriodData -> Text -> Text -> Task OuraHttpError (Array SleepPeriodData)
executeSleepTimeInternal :: HttpFetch SleepTimeData -> Text -> Text -> Task OuraHttpError (Array SleepTimeData)
executeVO2MaxInternal :: HttpFetch VO2MaxData -> Text -> Text -> Task OuraHttpError (Array VO2MaxData)
executeWorkoutInternal :: HttpFetch WorkoutData -> Text -> Text -> Task OuraHttpError (Array WorkoutData)
getOuraProvider :: ActionContext -> Task IntegrationError ValidatedOAuth2ProviderConfig
instance (Data.Aeson.Types.ToJSON.ToJSON command, GHC.TypeLits.KnownSymbol (Service.Command.Core.NameOf command)) => Integration.ToAction (Integration.Oura.Activity.DailyActivity command)
instance (Data.Aeson.Types.ToJSON.ToJSON command, GHC.TypeLits.KnownSymbol (Service.Command.Core.NameOf command)) => Integration.ToAction (Integration.Oura.DailyCardiovascularAge.DailyCardiovascularAge command)
instance (Data.Aeson.Types.ToJSON.ToJSON command, GHC.TypeLits.KnownSymbol (Service.Command.Core.NameOf command)) => Integration.ToAction (Integration.Oura.DailyResilience.DailyResilience command)
instance (Data.Aeson.Types.ToJSON.ToJSON command, GHC.TypeLits.KnownSymbol (Service.Command.Core.NameOf command)) => Integration.ToAction (Integration.Oura.DailySpO2.DailySpO2 command)
instance (Data.Aeson.Types.ToJSON.ToJSON command, GHC.TypeLits.KnownSymbol (Service.Command.Core.NameOf command)) => Integration.ToAction (Integration.Oura.DailyStress.DailyStress command)
instance (Data.Aeson.Types.ToJSON.ToJSON command, GHC.TypeLits.KnownSymbol (Service.Command.Core.NameOf command)) => Integration.ToAction (Integration.Oura.EnhancedTag.EnhancedTag command)
instance (Data.Aeson.Types.ToJSON.ToJSON command, GHC.TypeLits.KnownSymbol (Service.Command.Core.NameOf command)) => Integration.ToAction (Integration.Oura.HeartRate.HeartRate command)
instance (Data.Aeson.Types.ToJSON.ToJSON command, GHC.TypeLits.KnownSymbol (Service.Command.Core.NameOf command)) => Integration.ToAction (Integration.Oura.PersonalInfo.PersonalInfo command)
instance (Data.Aeson.Types.ToJSON.ToJSON command, GHC.TypeLits.KnownSymbol (Service.Command.Core.NameOf command)) => Integration.ToAction (Integration.Oura.Readiness.DailyReadiness command)
instance (Data.Aeson.Types.ToJSON.ToJSON command, GHC.TypeLits.KnownSymbol (Service.Command.Core.NameOf command)) => Integration.ToAction (Integration.Oura.RestModePeriod.RestModePeriod command)
instance (Data.Aeson.Types.ToJSON.ToJSON command, GHC.TypeLits.KnownSymbol (Service.Command.Core.NameOf command)) => Integration.ToAction (Integration.Oura.RingConfiguration.RingConfiguration command)
instance (Data.Aeson.Types.ToJSON.ToJSON command, GHC.TypeLits.KnownSymbol (Service.Command.Core.NameOf command)) => Integration.ToAction (Integration.Oura.Session.Session command)
instance (Data.Aeson.Types.ToJSON.ToJSON command, GHC.TypeLits.KnownSymbol (Service.Command.Core.NameOf command)) => Integration.ToAction (Integration.Oura.Sleep.DailySleep command)
instance (Data.Aeson.Types.ToJSON.ToJSON command, GHC.TypeLits.KnownSymbol (Service.Command.Core.NameOf command)) => Integration.ToAction (Integration.Oura.SleepPeriod.SleepPeriod command)
instance (Data.Aeson.Types.ToJSON.ToJSON command, GHC.TypeLits.KnownSymbol (Service.Command.Core.NameOf command)) => Integration.ToAction (Integration.Oura.SleepTime.SleepTime command)
instance (Data.Aeson.Types.ToJSON.ToJSON command, GHC.TypeLits.KnownSymbol (Service.Command.Core.NameOf command)) => Integration.ToAction (Integration.Oura.VO2Max.VO2Max command)
instance (Data.Aeson.Types.ToJSON.ToJSON command, GHC.TypeLits.KnownSymbol (Service.Command.Core.NameOf command)) => Integration.ToAction (Integration.Oura.Workout.Workout command)
instance GHC.Classes.Eq Integration.Oura.Internal.OuraHttpError
instance GHC.Show.Show Integration.Oura.Internal.OuraHttpError
isUnauthorized :: OuraHttpError -> Bool
mapTokenError :: TokenRefreshError OuraHttpError -> IntegrationError
realHttpFetch :: FromJSON value => HttpFetch value
realHttpFetchSingle :: FromJSON value => HttpFetchSingle value
type HttpFetch a = Text -> Text -> Task OuraHttpError PaginatedResponse a
type HttpFetchSingle a = Text -> Text -> Task OuraHttpError a
urlEncodeDatetime :: Text -> Text
urlEncodeParam :: Text -> Text

module Integration.Oura.PersonalInfo
PersonalInfo :: Text -> (PersonalInfoData -> command) -> Maybe (Text -> command) -> PersonalInfo command
[onError] :: PersonalInfo command -> Maybe (Text -> command)
[onSuccess] :: PersonalInfo command -> PersonalInfoData -> command
[userId] :: PersonalInfo command -> Text
data PersonalInfo command

module Integration.Oura.Provider
makeOuraConfig :: ClientId -> ClientSecret -> RedirectUri -> (Text -> TokenKey -> Text) -> (Text -> OAuth2Error -> Text) -> (Text -> Text) -> Text -> Text -> OAuth2ProviderConfig
ouraProvider :: Provider

module Integration.Oura.Readiness
DailyReadiness :: Text -> Text -> Text -> (Array ReadinessData -> command) -> Maybe (Text -> command) -> DailyReadiness command

[onError] :: DailyReadiness command -> Maybe (Text -> command)
[onSuccess] :: DailyReadiness command -> Array ReadinessData -> command
[startDate] :: DailyReadiness command -> Text
[userId] :: DailyReadiness command -> Text
data DailyReadiness command

[onSuccess] :: RestModePeriod command -> Array RestModePeriodData -> command
[startDate] :: RestModePeriod command -> Text
[userId] :: RestModePeriod command -> Text
data RestModePeriod command

[onSuccess] :: RingConfiguration command -> Array RingConfigurationData -> command
[startDate] :: RingConfiguration command -> Text
[userId] :: RingConfiguration command -> Text
data RingConfiguration command

module Integration.Oura.Session

[onSuccess] :: Session command -> Array SessionData -> command
[startDatetime] :: Session command -> Text
[userId] :: Session command -> Text
data Session command

[onSuccess] :: DailySleep command -> Array SleepData -> command
[startDate] :: DailySleep command -> Text
[userId] :: DailySleep command -> Text
data DailySleep command

[onSuccess] :: SleepPeriod command -> Array SleepPeriodData -> command
[startDate] :: SleepPeriod command -> Text
[userId] :: SleepPeriod command -> Text
data SleepPeriod command

SleepTime :: Text -> Text -> Text -> (Array SleepTimeData -> command) -> Maybe (Text -> command) -> SleepTime command
[endDate] :: SleepTime command -> Text

[onSuccess] :: SleepTime command -> Array SleepTimeData -> command
[startDate] :: SleepTime command -> Text
[userId] :: SleepTime command -> Text
data SleepTime command

module Integration.Oura.SyncAll
SyncAll :: Text -> Text -> Text -> (SyncResult -> command) -> Maybe (Text -> command) -> SyncAll command
SyncResult :: Array SleepData -> Array ActivityData -> Array ReadinessData -> Array HeartRateData -> Array WorkoutData -> Array SessionData -> PersonalInfoData -> Array DailyStressData -> Array DailySpO2Data -> Array DailyResilienceData -> Array DailyCardiovascularAgeData -> Array VO2MaxData -> Array EnhancedTagData -> Array SleepTimeData -> Array RestModePeriodData -> Array RingConfigurationData -> Array SleepPeriodData -> SyncResult
[activity] :: SyncResult -> Array ActivityData
[dailyCardiovascularAge] :: SyncResult -> Array DailyCardiovascularAgeData
[dailyResilience] :: SyncResult -> Array DailyResilienceData
[dailySpO2] :: SyncResult -> Array DailySpO2Data
[dailyStress] :: SyncResult -> Array DailyStressData
[endDate] :: SyncAll command -> Text
[enhancedTag] :: SyncResult -> Array EnhancedTagData
[heartRate] :: SyncResult -> Array HeartRateData
[onComplete] :: SyncAll command -> SyncResult -> command
[onError] :: SyncAll command -> Maybe (Text -> command)
[personalInfo] :: SyncResult -> PersonalInfoData
[readiness] :: SyncResult -> Array ReadinessData
[restModePeriod] :: SyncResult -> Array RestModePeriodData
[ringConfiguration] :: SyncResult -> Array RingConfigurationData
[session] :: SyncResult -> Array SessionData
[sleepPeriod] :: SyncResult -> Array SleepPeriodData
[sleepTime] :: SyncResult -> Array SleepTimeData
[sleep] :: SyncResult -> Array SleepData
[startDate] :: SyncAll command -> Text
[userId] :: SyncAll command -> Text
[vo2Max] :: SyncResult -> Array VO2MaxData
[workout] :: SyncResult -> Array WorkoutData
data SyncAll command
data SyncResult
executeSyncAll :: (ToJSON command, KnownSymbol (NameOf command)) => (forall value. FromJSON value => HttpFetch value) -> HttpFetchSingle PersonalInfoData -> ActionContext -> SyncAll command -> Task IntegrationError (Maybe CommandPayload)
instance (Data.Aeson.Types.ToJSON.ToJSON command, GHC.TypeLits.KnownSymbol (Service.Command.Core.NameOf command)) => Integration.ToAction (Integration.Oura.SyncAll.SyncAll command)
instance Data.Aeson.Types.ToJSON.ToJSON Integration.Oura.SyncAll.SyncResult
instance GHC.Classes.Eq Integration.Oura.SyncAll.SyncResult
instance GHC.Generics.Generic Integration.Oura.SyncAll.SyncResult
instance GHC.Show.Show Integration.Oura.SyncAll.SyncResult

module Integration.Oura.Types
ActivityContributors :: Maybe Int -> Maybe Int -> Maybe Int -> Maybe Int -> Maybe Int -> Maybe Int -> ActivityContributors
ActivityData :: Text -> Text -> Maybe Int -> Maybe Int -> Maybe Int -> Maybe Int -> Maybe Int -> Maybe Int -> Maybe Int -> Text -> Maybe Float -> Maybe Text -> Maybe ActivityContributors -> Maybe Int -> Maybe Int -> Maybe Int -> Maybe Int -> Maybe Int -> Maybe SampleModel -> Maybe Int -> Maybe Int -> Maybe Int -> Maybe Int -> Maybe Int -> Maybe Int -> Maybe Int -> ActivityData
DailyCardiovascularAgeData :: Text -> Text -> Maybe Int -> DailyCardiovascularAgeData
DailyResilienceData :: Text -> Text -> Maybe ResilienceContributors -> Maybe Text -> DailyResilienceData
DailySpO2Data :: Text -> Text -> Maybe SpO2AggregatedValues -> DailySpO2Data
DailyStressData :: Text -> Text -> Maybe Float -> Maybe Float -> Maybe Text -> DailyStressData
EnhancedTagData :: Text -> Text -> Maybe Text -> Maybe Text -> Maybe Text -> Maybe Text -> Maybe Text -> Maybe Text -> Maybe Text -> EnhancedTagData
HeartRateData :: Int -> Text -> Text -> HeartRateData
PaginatedResponse :: [value] -> Maybe Text -> PaginatedResponse value
PersonalInfoData :: Text -> Maybe Int -> Maybe Float -> Maybe Float -> Maybe Text -> Maybe Text -> PersonalInfoData
ReadinessContributors :: Maybe Int -> Maybe Int -> Maybe Int -> Maybe Int -> Maybe Int -> Maybe Int -> Maybe Int -> Maybe Int -> Maybe Int -> ReadinessContributors
ReadinessData :: Text -> Text -> Maybe Int -> Maybe Float -> Maybe Float -> Text -> Maybe ReadinessContributors -> ReadinessData
ResilienceContributors :: Maybe Float -> Maybe Float -> Maybe Float -> ResilienceContributors
RestModeEpisode :: Maybe [Text] -> Text -> RestModeEpisode
RestModePeriodData :: Text -> Maybe Text -> Maybe Text -> Maybe [RestModeEpisode] -> Maybe Text -> Maybe Text -> RestModePeriodData
RingConfigurationData :: Text -> Maybe Text -> Maybe Text -> Maybe Text -> Maybe Text -> Maybe Text -> Maybe Int -> RingConfigurationData
SampleModel :: Maybe Float -> Maybe [Maybe Float] -> Maybe Text -> SampleModel
SessionData :: Text -> Text -> Maybe Text -> Maybe SampleModel -> Maybe SampleModel -> Maybe Text -> Maybe SampleModel -> Maybe Text -> Maybe Text -> SessionData
SleepContributors :: Maybe Int -> Maybe Int -> Maybe Int -> Maybe Int -> Maybe Int -> Maybe Int -> Maybe Int -> SleepContributors
SleepData :: Text -> Text -> Maybe Int -> Text -> Maybe SleepContributors -> SleepData
SleepPeriodData :: Text -> Text -> Text -> Maybe Float -> Maybe Float -> Maybe Float -> Maybe Int -> Maybe Text -> Maybe Text -> Maybe Int -> Maybe Int -> Maybe SampleModel -> Maybe SampleModel -> Maybe Int -> Maybe Int -> Maybe Bool -> Maybe Int -> Maybe Text -> Maybe Int -> Maybe SleepPeriodReadiness -> Maybe Float -> Maybe Int -> Maybe Int -> Maybe Text -> Maybe Text -> Maybe Float -> Maybe Int -> Maybe Int -> Maybe Text -> SleepPeriodData
SleepPeriodReadiness :: Maybe ReadinessContributors -> Maybe Int -> Maybe Float -> Maybe Float -> SleepPeriodReadiness
SleepTimeData :: Text -> Text -> Maybe Text -> Maybe Text -> Maybe Text -> Maybe Text -> Maybe Text -> SleepTimeData
SpO2AggregatedValues :: Float -> SpO2AggregatedValues
VO2MaxData :: Text -> Text -> Maybe Float -> Maybe Text -> VO2MaxData
WorkoutData :: Text -> Text -> Maybe Text -> Maybe Float -> Maybe Float -> Maybe Text -> Maybe Text -> Maybe Text -> Maybe Text -> Maybe Text -> WorkoutData
[activeCalories] :: ActivityData -> Maybe Int
[activityBalance] :: ReadinessContributors -> Maybe Int
[activity] :: WorkoutData -> Maybe Text
[age] :: PersonalInfoData -> Maybe Int
[averageBreath] :: SleepPeriodData -> Maybe Float
[averageHeartRate] :: SleepPeriodData -> Maybe Float
[averageHrv] :: SleepPeriodData -> Maybe Float
[averageMetMinutes] :: ActivityData -> Maybe Float
[average] :: SpO2AggregatedValues -> Float
[awakeTime] :: SleepPeriodData -> Maybe Int
[bedtimeEnd] :: SleepPeriodData -> Maybe Text
[bedtimeStart] :: SleepPeriodData -> Maybe Text
[biologicalSex] :: PersonalInfoData -> Maybe Text
[bodyTemperature] :: ReadinessContributors -> Maybe Int
[bpm] :: HeartRateData -> Int
[calories] :: WorkoutData -> Maybe Float
[class5Min] :: ActivityData -> Maybe Text
[color] :: RingConfigurationData -> Maybe Text
[comment] :: EnhancedTagData -> Maybe Text
[contributors] :: ActivityData -> Maybe ActivityContributors
[contributors] :: DailyResilienceData -> Maybe ResilienceContributors
[contributors] :: ReadinessData -> Maybe ReadinessContributors
[contributors] :: SleepData -> Maybe SleepContributors
[contributors] :: SleepPeriodReadiness -> Maybe ReadinessContributors
[data_] :: PaginatedResponse value -> [value]
[daySummary] :: DailyStressData -> Maybe Text
[day] :: ActivityData -> Text
[day] :: DailyCardiovascularAgeData -> Text
[day] :: DailyResilienceData -> Text
[day] :: DailySpO2Data -> Text
[day] :: DailyStressData -> Text
[day] :: EnhancedTagData -> Text
[day] :: ReadinessData -> Text
[day] :: SessionData -> Text
[day] :: SleepData -> Text
[day] :: SleepPeriodData -> Text
[day] :: SleepTimeData -> Text
[day] :: VO2MaxData -> Text
[day] :: WorkoutData -> Text
[daytimeRecovery] :: ResilienceContributors -> Maybe Float
[deepSleepDuration] :: SleepPeriodData -> Maybe Int
[deepSleep] :: SleepContributors -> Maybe Int
[design] :: RingConfigurationData -> Maybe Text
[distance] :: WorkoutData -> Maybe Float
[efficiency] :: SleepContributors -> Maybe Int
[efficiency] :: SleepPeriodData -> Maybe Int
[email] :: PersonalInfoData -> Maybe Text
[endDate] :: RestModePeriodData -> Maybe Text
[endDatetime] :: EnhancedTagData -> Maybe Text
[endDatetime] :: SessionData -> Maybe Text
[endDatetime] :: WorkoutData -> Maybe Text
[endDay] :: RestModePeriodData -> Maybe Text
[endTime] :: EnhancedTagData -> Maybe Text
[episodes] :: RestModePeriodData -> Maybe [RestModeEpisode]
[equivalentWalkingDistance] :: ActivityData -> Maybe Int
[firmwareVersion] :: RingConfigurationData -> Maybe Text
[hardwareType] :: RingConfigurationData -> Maybe Text
[heartRate] :: SessionData -> Maybe SampleModel
[heartRate] :: SleepPeriodData -> Maybe SampleModel
[height] :: PersonalInfoData -> Maybe Float
[highActivityMetMinutes] :: ActivityData -> Maybe Int
[highActivityTime] :: ActivityData -> Maybe Int
[hrvBalance] :: ReadinessContributors -> Maybe Int
[hrv] :: SessionData -> Maybe SampleModel
[hrv] :: SleepPeriodData -> Maybe SampleModel
[id] :: ActivityData -> Text

[id] :: DailyResilienceData -> Text
[id] :: DailySpO2Data -> Text

[id] :: SleepData -> Text

[id] :: SleepTimeData -> Text
[id] :: VO2MaxData -> Text
[id] :: WorkoutData -> Text
[inactivityAlerts] :: ActivityData -> Maybe Int
[intensity] :: WorkoutData -> Maybe Text
[interval] :: SampleModel -> Maybe Float
[items] :: SampleModel -> Maybe [Maybe Float]
[label] :: WorkoutData -> Maybe Text
[latency] :: SleepContributors -> Maybe Int
[latency] :: SleepPeriodData -> Maybe Int
[level] :: DailyResilienceData -> Maybe Text
[lightSleepDuration] :: SleepPeriodData -> Maybe Int
[lowActivityMetMinutes] :: ActivityData -> Maybe Int
[lowActivityTime] :: ActivityData -> Maybe Int
[lowBatteryAlert] :: SleepPeriodData -> Maybe Bool
[lowestHeartRate] :: SleepPeriodData -> Maybe Int
[mediumActivityMetMinutes] :: ActivityData -> Maybe Int
[mediumActivityTime] :: ActivityData -> Maybe Int
[meetDailyTargets] :: ActivityContributors -> Maybe Int
[met] :: ActivityData -> Maybe SampleModel
[metersToTarget] :: ActivityData -> Maybe Int
[mood] :: SessionData -> Maybe Text
[motionCount] :: SessionData -> Maybe SampleModel
[moveEveryHour] :: ActivityContributors -> Maybe Int
[movementThirtySec] :: SleepPeriodData -> Maybe Text
[nextToken] :: PaginatedResponse value -> Maybe Text
[nonWearTime] :: ActivityData -> Maybe Int
[optimalBedtimeEnd] :: SleepTimeData -> Maybe Text
[optimalBedtimeStart] :: SleepTimeData -> Maybe Text
[period] :: SleepPeriodData -> Maybe Int
[previousDayActivity] :: ReadinessContributors -> Maybe Int
[previousNight] :: ReadinessContributors -> Maybe Int
[readinessScoreDelta] :: SleepPeriodData -> Maybe Float
[readiness] :: SleepPeriodData -> Maybe SleepPeriodReadiness

[recoveryHigh] :: DailyStressData -> Maybe Float
[recoveryIndex] :: ReadinessContributors -> Maybe Int

[remSleepDuration] :: SleepPeriodData -> Maybe Int

[sedentaryMetMinutes] :: ActivityData -> Maybe Int

[size] :: RingConfigurationData -> Maybe Int
[sleepAlgorithmVersion] :: SleepPeriodData -> Maybe Text
[sleepBalance] :: ReadinessContributors -> Maybe Int
[sleepPhase5Min] :: SleepPeriodData -> Maybe Text
[sleepRecovery] :: ResilienceContributors -> Maybe Float
[sleepRegularity] :: ReadinessContributors -> Maybe Int
[sleepScoreDelta] :: SleepPeriodData -> Maybe Float
[source] :: HeartRateData -> Text
[source] :: WorkoutData -> Maybe Text
[spO2Percentage] :: DailySpO2Data -> Maybe SpO2AggregatedValues
[startDate] :: RestModePeriodData -> Maybe Text
[startDatetime] :: EnhancedTagData -> Maybe Text
[startDatetime] :: SessionData -> Maybe Text
[startDatetime] :: WorkoutData -> Maybe Text
[startDay] :: RestModePeriodData -> Maybe Text
[startTime] :: EnhancedTagData -> Maybe Text
[status] :: SleepTimeData -> Maybe Text
[stayActive] :: ActivityContributors -> Maybe Int
[steps] :: ActivityData -> Maybe Int
[stressHigh] :: DailyStressData -> Maybe Float
[stress] :: ResilienceContributors -> Maybe Float
[tagTypeCode] :: EnhancedTagData -> Maybe Text
[tags] :: RestModeEpisode -> Maybe [Text]
[targetCalories] :: ActivityData -> Maybe Int
[targetMeters] :: ActivityData -> Maybe Int
[temperatureDeviation] :: ReadinessData -> Maybe Float
[temperatureDeviation] :: SleepPeriodReadiness -> Maybe Float
[temperatureTrendDeviation] :: ReadinessData -> Maybe Float
[temperatureTrendDeviation] :: SleepPeriodReadiness -> Maybe Float
[timeInBed] :: SleepPeriodData -> Maybe Int
[timestamp] :: ActivityData -> Text
[timestamp] :: EnhancedTagData -> Maybe Text
[timestamp] :: HeartRateData -> Text
[timestamp] :: ReadinessData -> Text
[timestamp] :: RestModeEpisode -> Text
[timestamp] :: SampleModel -> Maybe Text
[timestamp] :: SleepData -> Text
[timestamp] :: SleepPeriodData -> Text
[timestamp] :: SleepTimeData -> Maybe Text

[timing] :: SleepContributors -> Maybe Int
[totalCalories] :: ActivityData -> Maybe Int
[totalSleepDuration] :: SleepPeriodData -> Maybe Int
[totalSleep] :: SleepContributors -> Maybe Int
[trainingFrequency] :: ActivityContributors -> Maybe Int
[trainingVolume] :: ActivityContributors -> Maybe Int
[type_] :: SessionData -> Maybe Text
[type_] :: SleepPeriodData -> Maybe Text
[vascularAge] :: DailyCardiovascularAgeData -> Maybe Int
[vo2Max] :: VO2MaxData -> Maybe Float
[weight] :: PersonalInfoData -> Maybe Float
data ActivityContributors
data ActivityData
data DailyCardiovascularAgeData
data DailyResilienceData
data DailySpO2Data
data DailyStressData
data EnhancedTagData
data HeartRateData
data PaginatedResponse value
data PersonalInfoData
data ReadinessContributors

data ResilienceContributors
data RestModeEpisode
data RestModePeriodData
data RingConfigurationData
data SampleModel
data SessionData
data SleepContributors
data SleepData
data SleepPeriodData
data SleepPeriodReadiness
data SleepTimeData
data SpO2AggregatedValues
data VO2MaxData
data WorkoutData
instance Data.Aeson.Types.FromJSON.FromJSON Integration.Oura.Types.ActivityContributors

instance Data.Aeson.Types.FromJSON.FromJSON Integration.Oura.Types.DailyCardiovascularAgeData

instance Data.Aeson.Types.FromJSON.FromJSON Integration.Oura.Types.HeartRateData

module Integration.Oura.VO2Max
VO2Max :: Text -> Text -> Text -> (Array VO2MaxData -> command) -> Maybe (Text -> command) -> VO2Max command
[endDate] :: VO2Max command -> Text
[onError] :: VO2Max command -> Maybe (Text -> command)
[onSuccess] :: VO2Max command -> Array VO2MaxData -> command
[startDate] :: VO2Max command -> Text
[userId] :: VO2Max command -> Text
data VO2Max command

module Integration.Oura.Workout
Workout :: Text -> Text -> Text -> (Array WorkoutData -> command) -> Maybe (Text -> command) -> Workout command
[endDate] :: Workout command -> Text
[onError] :: Workout command -> Maybe (Text -> command)
[onSuccess] :: Workout command -> Array WorkoutData -> command
[startDate] :: Workout command -> Text
[userId] :: Workout command -> Text
data Workout command

module Integration.Pdf

module Integration.Pdf.ExtractText
ASCII :: Encoding
Config :: Layout -> Maybe (Int, Int) -> Encoding -> Int -> Config
ExtractionResult :: Text -> Int -> Maybe PdfMetadata -> ExtractionResult
Latin1 :: Encoding
PdfMetadata :: Maybe Text -> Maybe Text -> Maybe Text -> Maybe Text -> PdfMetadata
PreserveLayout :: Layout
RawText :: Layout
Request :: FileRef -> Config -> (ExtractionResult -> command) -> (Text -> command) -> Request command
Table :: Layout
UTF8 :: Encoding
[author] :: PdfMetadata -> Maybe Text
[config] :: Request command -> Config
[creationDate] :: PdfMetadata -> Maybe Text
[encoding] :: Config -> Encoding
[fileRef] :: Request command -> FileRef
[layout] :: Config -> Layout
[metadata] :: ExtractionResult -> Maybe PdfMetadata
[onError] :: Request command -> Text -> command
[onSuccess] :: Request command -> ExtractionResult -> command
[pageCount] :: ExtractionResult -> Int
[pageRange] :: Config -> Maybe (Int, Int)
[pageSize] :: PdfMetadata -> Maybe Text
[text] :: ExtractionResult -> Text
[timeoutSeconds] :: Config -> Int
[title] :: PdfMetadata -> Maybe Text
data Config
data Encoding
data ExtractionResult
data Layout
data PdfMetadata
data Request command
defaultConfig :: Config
instance Data.Aeson.Types.FromJSON.FromJSON Integration.Pdf.ExtractText.Config
instance Data.Aeson.Types.FromJSON.FromJSON Integration.Pdf.ExtractText.Encoding
instance Data.Aeson.Types.FromJSON.FromJSON Integration.Pdf.ExtractText.ExtractionResult
instance Data.Aeson.Types.FromJSON.FromJSON Integration.Pdf.ExtractText.Layout
instance Data.Aeson.Types.FromJSON.FromJSON Integration.Pdf.ExtractText.PdfMetadata
instance Data.Aeson.Types.ToJSON.ToJSON Integration.Pdf.ExtractText.Config
instance Data.Aeson.Types.ToJSON.ToJSON Integration.Pdf.ExtractText.Encoding
instance Data.Aeson.Types.ToJSON.ToJSON Integration.Pdf.ExtractText.ExtractionResult
instance Data.Aeson.Types.ToJSON.ToJSON Integration.Pdf.ExtractText.Layout
instance Data.Aeson.Types.ToJSON.ToJSON Integration.Pdf.ExtractText.PdfMetadata
instance GHC.Classes.Eq Integration.Pdf.ExtractText.Config
instance GHC.Classes.Eq Integration.Pdf.ExtractText.Encoding
instance GHC.Classes.Eq Integration.Pdf.ExtractText.ExtractionResult
instance GHC.Classes.Eq Integration.Pdf.ExtractText.Layout
instance GHC.Classes.Eq Integration.Pdf.ExtractText.PdfMetadata
instance GHC.Generics.Generic (Integration.Pdf.ExtractText.Request command)
instance GHC.Generics.Generic Integration.Pdf.ExtractText.Config
instance GHC.Generics.Generic Integration.Pdf.ExtractText.Encoding
instance GHC.Generics.Generic Integration.Pdf.ExtractText.ExtractionResult
instance GHC.Generics.Generic Integration.Pdf.ExtractText.Layout
instance GHC.Generics.Generic Integration.Pdf.ExtractText.PdfMetadata
instance GHC.Show.Show Integration.Pdf.ExtractText.Config
instance GHC.Show.Show Integration.Pdf.ExtractText.Encoding
instance GHC.Show.Show Integration.Pdf.ExtractText.ExtractionResult
instance GHC.Show.Show Integration.Pdf.ExtractText.Layout
instance GHC.Show.Show Integration.Pdf.ExtractText.PdfMetadata

module Integration.Pdf.ExtractText.Internal
buildPdftotextArgs :: Config -> Path -> Array Text
extractPageCount :: Text -> Int
instance (Data.Aeson.Types.ToJSON.ToJSON command, GHC.TypeLits.KnownSymbol (Service.Command.Core.NameOf command)) => Integration.ToAction (Integration.Pdf.ExtractText.Request command)
parsePdfInfo :: Text -> PdfMetadata
